compiledCloudFormationTemplate.Description: The AWS CloudFormation template for this Serverless application
The AWS CloudFormation template for this Serverless application

C:\\Users\\Sakthibalan\\Desktop\\Sakthi_.serviceRawFile:
service: cracker-backend

provider:
  name: aws
  runtime: nodejs24.x
  region: ap-south-1
  stage: dev

  environment:
    JWT_SECRET: ${env:JWT_SECRET}
    CART_TABLE: Carts
    PRODUCTS_TABLE: Products
    ORDERS_TABLE: Orders
    BUCKET_NAME: cracker-app
    BRAND_TABLE: Brands
    CATEGORY_TABLE: Categories
    USERS_TABLE: Users
    ADMIN_CONFIG_TABLE: AdminConfig
    DISCOUNT_TABLE: Discounts
    CONTACT_TABLE: ContactUs
    OTP_TABLE: OtpTable
    OTP_TEMPLATE_ID: ${env:OTP_TEMPLATE_ID}
    MSG91_AUTH_KEY: ${env:MSG91_AUTH_KEY}
    RECAPTCHA_SECRET: ${env:RECAPTCHA_SECRET}
    REGION: ap-south-1

  httpApi:
    cors:
      allowedOrigins:
        - http://localhost:5173
        - https://frontend-cracker-shop.vercel.app
      allowedHeaders:
        - Content-Type
        - Authorization
        - x-guest-id
      allowedMethods:
        - GET
        - POST
        - PUT
        - DELETE
        - PATCH
      allowCredentials: false

    binaryMediaTypes:
      - application/pdf

  iam:
    role:
      statements:
        - Effect: Allow
          Action:
            - dynamodb:GetItem
            - dynamodb:PutItem
            - dynamodb:UpdateItem
            - dynamodb:Query
            - dynamodb:Scan
            - dynamodb:DeleteItem
            - dynamodb:BatchGetItem
            - dynamodb:BatchWriteItem
          Resource:
            - arn:aws:dynamodb:ap-south-1:*:table/Users
            - arn:aws:dynamodb:ap-south-1:*:table/Products
            - arn:aws:dynamodb:ap-south-1:*:table/Products*
            - arn:aws:dynamodb:ap-south-1:*:table/Products/index/*
            - arn:aws:dynamodb:ap-south-1:*:table/Categories
            - arn:aws:dynamodb:ap-south-1:*:table/Brands
            - arn:aws:dynamodb:ap-south-1:*:table/Discounts
            - arn:aws:dynamodb:ap-south-1:*:table/Carts*
            - arn:aws:dynamodb:ap-south-1:*:table/Orders
            - arn:aws:dynamodb:ap-south-1:*:table/Orders/index/*
            - arn:aws:dynamodb:ap-south-1:*:table/AdminConfig*
            - arn:aws:dynamodb:ap-south-1:*:table/ContactUs*
            - arn:aws:dynamodb:ap-south-1:*:table/OtpTable*

        - Effect: Allow
          Action:
            - s3:ListBucket
          Resource:
            - arn:aws:s3:::cracker-app

        - Effect: Allow
          Action:
            - s3:PutObject
            - s3:GetObject
            - s3:DeleteObject
          Resource:
            - arn:aws:s3:::cracker-app/products/*
            - arn:aws:s3:::cracker-app/imports/*
            - arn:aws:s3:::cracker-app/brands/*
            - arn:aws:s3:::cracker-app/categories/*
            - arn:aws:s3:::cracker-app/config/*
            - arn:aws:s3:::cracker-app/templates/*

package:
  patterns:
    - assets/**

functions:
  login:
    handler: src/auth/login.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /auth/login
          method: post

  sendOtp:
    handler: src/auth/send-otp.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /auth/register/send-otp
          method: post

  register:
    handler: src/auth/register.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /auth/register/verify
          method: post

  getProfile:
    handler: src/user/get-profile.main
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /user/profile
          method: get

  updateProfile:
    handler: src/user/update-profile.main
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /user/profile
          method: put

  getProducts:
    handler: src/handlers/getProducts.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /products
          method: get

  getProductDetails:
    handler: src/handlers/getProductDetails.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /products/details/{productId}
          method: get

  getProductsByCategory:
    handler: src/handlers/getProductsByCategory.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /products/category/{categoryId}
          method: get

  getProductsByBrand:
    handler: src/handlers/getProductsByBrand.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /products/brand/{brandId}
          method: get

  getCategories:
    handler: src/handlers/getCategories.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /categories
          method: get

  getBrands:
    handler: src/handlers/getBrands.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /brands
          method: get

  getCart:
    handler: src/handlers/cart.getCart
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /cart
          method: GET

  addCartItem:
    handler: src/handlers/cart.addItem
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /cart/add
          method: POST

  removeCartItem:
    handler: src/handlers/cart.removeItem
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /cart/remove
          method: POST

  clearCart:
    handler: src/handlers/cart.clearCart
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /cart/clear
          method: POST

  productBatch:
    handler: src/handlers/productBatch.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /products/batch
          method: POST

  cartMerge:
    handler: src/handlers/cartMerge.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /cart/merge
          method: POST

  cartSync:
    handler: src/handlers/cartSync.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /cart/sync
          method: POST

  createOrder:
    handler: src/handlers/Orders.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /orders
          method: POST

  getOrders:
    handler: src/handlers/getOrders.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /orders
          method: GET

  cancelOrder:
    handler: src/handlers/cancelOrder.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /orders/{orderId}/cancel
          method: PUT

  adjustOrder:
    handler: src/handlers/adjustOrder.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /orders/{orderId}/adjust
          method: PUT

  adminDashboard:
    handler: src/handlers/adminDashboard.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /admin/dashboard
          method: GET

  adminOrders:
    handler: src/handlers/adminOrders.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /admin/orders
          method: GET

  adminOrderDetails:
    handler: src/handlers/adminOrderDetails.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /admin/orders/{orderId}
          method: GET

  adminOrderUpdate:
    handler: src/handlers/adminUpdateOrder.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /admin/orders/{orderId}
          method: PUT

  adminGetProducts:
    handler: src/handlers/getAdminProducts.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /admin/products
          method: GET

  adminCreateProduct:
    handler: src/handlers/createAdminProduct.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /admin/product
          method: POST

  adminUpdateProduct:
    handler: src/handlers/updateAdminProduct.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /admin/products/{productId}
          method: PATCH

  adminDeactivateProduct:
    handler: src/handlers/deactivateAdminProduct.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /admin/products/{productId}/deactivate
          method: PATCH

  getPresignedURL:
    handler: src/handlers/getPresignedUrls.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /admin/products/presign
          method: POST

  adminGetProduct:
    handler: src/handlers/getAdminProduct.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /admin/products/{productId}
          method: GET

  getProductUploadURL:
    handler: src/handlers/adminGenerateImportUploadUrl.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /admin/products/import/upload-url
          method: POST

  getProductValidateURL:
    handler: src/handlers/adminValidateProductImport.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /admin/products/import/validate
          method: POST

  getProductUploadConfirm:
    handler: src/handlers/adminConfirmProductImport.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /admin/products/import/confirm
          method: POST

  getCategoryList:
    handler: src/handlers/adminListCategories.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /admin/categories
          method: GET

  CreateCategory:
    handler: src/handlers/adminCreateCategory.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /admin/categories
          method: POST

  UpdateStatusCategory:
    handler: src/handlers/adminUpdateCategoryStatus.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /admin/categories/{categoryId}/status
          method: PATCH

  UpdateCategory:
    handler: src/handlers/adminUpdateCategory.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /admin/categories/{categoryId}
          method: PUT

  getCategoryById:
    handler: src/handlers/adminGetCategoryById.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /admin/categories/{categoryId}
          method: GET

  AdminDeleteCategory:
    handler: src/handlers/adminDeleteCategory.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /admin/categories/{categoryId}
          method: delete

  CategoryPresignUrl:
    handler: src/handlers/adminPresignCategoryImage.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /admin/categories/presign-image
          method: POST

  cleanupOrphanProductImages:
    handler: src/handlers/cleanupOrphanProductImages.handler
    events:
      - schedule:
          rate: cron(0 2 * * ? *)

  AdminListBrands:
    handler: src/handlers/adminListBrands.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /admin/brands
          method: GET

  AdminGetBrandById:
    handler: src/handlers/adminGetBrand.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /admin/brands/{brandId}
          method: GET

  AdminCreateBrand:
    handler: src/handlers/adminCreateBrand.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /admin/brands
          method: POST

  AdminUpdateBrand:
    handler: src/handlers/adminUpdateBrand.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /admin/brands/{brandId}
          method: PUT

  AdminUpdateBrandStatus:
    handler: src/handlers/adminUpdateBrandStatus.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /admin/brands/{brandId}/status
          method: PATCH

  AdminDeleteBrand:
    handler: src/handlers/adminDeleteBrand.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /admin/brands/{brandId}
          method: DELETE

  AdminPresignBrandLogo:
    handler: src/handlers/adminPresignBrandLogo.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /admin/brands/presign-logo
          method: POST

  adminListUsers:
    handler: src/handlers/adminListUsers.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /admin/users
          method: GET

  adminDeleteUser:
    handler: src/handlers/adminDeleteUser.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /admin/users/{userId}
          method: DELETE

  deleteProduct:
    handler: src/handlers/deleteProduct.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /admin/products/{productId}
          method: DELETE

  getConfig:
    handler: src/handlers/getConfig.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /config
          method: GET

  updateAdminConfig:
    handler: src/handlers/adminUpdateConfig.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /admin/config
          method: PUT

  AdminPresignConfigLogo:
    handler: src/handlers/adminConfigSliderPresign.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /admin/config/slider-presign
          method: POST

  adminListDiscounts:
    handler: src/handlers/adminListDiscounts.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /admin/discounts
          method: GET

  adminCreateDiscount:
    handler: src/handlers/adminCreateDiscount.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /admin/discounts
          method: POST

  adminGetDiscountById:
    handler: src/handlers/adminGetDiscountById.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /admin/discounts/{discountId}
          method: GET

  adminUpdateDiscount:
    handler: src/handlers/adminUpdateDiscount.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /admin/discounts/{discountId}
          method: PUT

  orderInvoice:
    handler: src/handlers/orderInvoice.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /orders/{orderId}/invoice
          method: GET

  revenueReport:
    handler: src/handlers/getRevenueReport.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /admin/reports/revenue
          method: GET

  productReport:
    handler: src/handlers/getProductReport.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /admin/reports/products
          method: GET

  getProductXlsPresignedURL:
    handler: src/handlers/productSampleXls.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /api/template-download
          method: GET

  restoreOrder:
    handler: src/handlers/orderRestore.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /orders/restore
          method: POST

  populerProducts:
    handler: src/handlers/popularProducts.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /products/popular
          method: GET

  forgotSendOtp:
    handler: src/auth/forgot/send-otp.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /auth/forgot/send-otp
          method: POST

  resetPassword:
    handler: src/auth/forgot/reset.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /auth/forgot/reset
          method: POST

  contactSubmit:
    handler: src/handlers/contactSubmit.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /contact
          method: POST

  contactList:
    handler: src/handlers/contactList.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /admin/contact
          method: GET

  contactUpdate:
    handler: src/handlers/contactUpdate.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /admin/contact/{contactId}
          method: PUT

resources:
  Resources:
    ProductImagesBucket:
      Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
      Properties:
        BucketName: cracker-app
        PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
          BlockPublicAcls: false
          BlockPublicPolicy: false
          IgnorePublicAcls: false
          RestrictPublicBuckets: false
        CorsConfiguration:
          CorsRules:
            - AllowedOrigins:
                - http://localhost:5173
                - https://frontend-cracker-shop.vercel.app
              AllowedMethods:
                - GET
                - PUT
                - POST
              AllowedHeaders:
                - "*"
              MaxAge: 3000
    ProductImagesBucketPolicy:
      Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
      Properties:
        Bucket: cracker-app
        PolicyDocument:
          Version: "2012-10-17"
          Statement:
            - Sid: PublicReadProductImages
              Effect: Allow
              Principal: "*"
              Action:
                - s3:GetObject
              Resource:
                - arn:aws:s3:::cracker-app/products/*
                - arn:aws:s3:::cracker-app/categories/*
                - arn:aws:s3:::cracker-app/brands/*
                - arn:aws:s3:::cracker-app/imports/*
                - arn:aws:s3:::cracker-app/config/*

    UsersTable:
      Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
      Properties:
        TableName: Users
        BillingMode: PAY_PER_REQUEST
        AttributeDefinitions:
          - AttributeName: mobile
            AttributeType: S
        KeySchema:
          - AttributeName: mobile
            KeyType: HASH

    BrandsTable:
      Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
      Properties:
        TableName: Brands
        BillingMode: PAY_PER_REQUEST
        AttributeDefinitions:
          - AttributeName: brandId
            AttributeType: S
        KeySchema:
          - AttributeName: brandId
            KeyType: HASH

    CategoriesTable:
      Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
      Properties:
        TableName: Categories
        BillingMode: PAY_PER_REQUEST
        AttributeDefinitions:
          - AttributeName: categoryId
            AttributeType: S
        KeySchema:
          - AttributeName: categoryId
            KeyType: HASH

    OrdersTable:
      Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
      Properties:
        TableName: Orders
        BillingMode: PAY_PER_REQUEST

        AttributeDefinitions:
          - AttributeName: orderId
            AttributeType: S
          - AttributeName: meta
            AttributeType: S
          - AttributeName: userId
            AttributeType: S
          - AttributeName: createdAt
            AttributeType: N
          - AttributeName: status
            AttributeType: S

        KeySchema:
          - AttributeName: orderId
            KeyType: HASH
          - AttributeName: meta
            KeyType: RANGE

        GlobalSecondaryIndexes:
          - IndexName: userId-createdAt-index
            KeySchema:
              - AttributeName: userId
                KeyType: HASH
              - AttributeName: createdAt
                KeyType: RANGE
            Projection:
              ProjectionType: ALL

          - IndexName: meta-createdAt-index
            KeySchema:
              - AttributeName: meta
                KeyType: HASH
              - AttributeName: createdAt
                KeyType: RANGE
            Projection:
              ProjectionType: ALL

          - IndexName: status-meta-index
            KeySchema:
              - AttributeName: status
                KeyType: HASH
              - AttributeName: meta
                KeyType: RANGE
            Projection:
              ProjectionType: ALL

    ProductsTable:
      Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
      Properties:
        TableName: Products
        BillingMode: PAY_PER_REQUEST

        AttributeDefinitions:
          - AttributeName: productId
            AttributeType: S
          - AttributeName: categoryId
            AttributeType: S
          - AttributeName: brandId
            AttributeType: S
          - AttributeName: isActive
            AttributeType: S

        KeySchema:
          - AttributeName: productId
            KeyType: HASH

        GlobalSecondaryIndexes:
          - IndexName: isActive-index
            KeySchema:
              - AttributeName: isActive
                KeyType: HASH
            Projection:
              ProjectionType: ALL

          - IndexName: categoryId-index
            KeySchema:
              - AttributeName: categoryId
                KeyType: HASH
            Projection:
              ProjectionType: ALL

          - IndexName: brandId-index
            KeySchema:
              - AttributeName: brandId
                KeyType: HASH
            Projection:
              ProjectionType: ALL

    DiscountsTable:
      Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
      Properties:
        TableName: Discounts
        BillingMode: PAY_PER_REQUEST
        AttributeDefinitions:
          - AttributeName: discountId
            AttributeType: S
        KeySchema:
          - AttributeName: discountId
            KeyType: HASH

    CartsTable:
      Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
      Properties:
        TableName: Carts
        BillingMode: PAY_PER_REQUEST
        AttributeDefinitions:
          - AttributeName: cartId
            AttributeType: S
          - AttributeName: itemId
            AttributeType: S
        KeySchema:
          - AttributeName: cartId
            KeyType: HASH
          - AttributeName: itemId
            KeyType: RANGE

    AdminConfigTable:
      Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
      Properties:
        TableName: AdminConfig
        BillingMode: PAY_PER_REQUEST
        AttributeDefinitions:
          - AttributeName: configId
            AttributeType: S
        KeySchema:
          - AttributeName: configId
            KeyType: HASH

    ContactUsTable:
      Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
      Properties:
        TableName: ContactUs
        BillingMode: PAY_PER_REQUEST
        AttributeDefinitions:
          - AttributeName: contactId
            AttributeType: S
        KeySchema:
          - AttributeName: contactId
            KeyType: HASH

    OtpTable:
      Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
      Properties:
        TableName: OtpTable
        BillingMode: PAY_PER_REQUEST

        AttributeDefinitions:
          - AttributeName: mobile
            AttributeType: S

        KeySchema:
          - AttributeName: mobile
            KeyType: HASH

        TimeToLiveSpecification:
          AttributeName: ttl
          Enabled: true

compiledCloudFormationTemplate.Description: The AWS CloudFormation template for this Serverless application
